posts.title: Saudi Arabia launches Tier IV data center for AI-powered economy | SDAIA | سدايا posted on the topic
posts.snippet: # Saudi Arabia launches Tier IV data center for AI-powered economy. Saudi Arabia has established the world’s largest government data center, classified as Tier IV, the highest standard, in line with the aspirations of His Royal Highness the Crown Prince to build a national, data-driven and AI-powered economy. Establishing the world’s largest Tier IV government data center lays a strong foundation
